category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the CLI for managing Lacework.
source_facts.homepage points to official Lacework CLI documentation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lacework-cli and source_facts.description identifies it as the Lacework CLI.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/lacework/go-sdk, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Lacework management via CLI.
source_facts.homepage is the official Lacework CLI documentation page.
